proxies.name: Local dev proxy (localproxy)
proxies.notes: Start with: go run ./cmd/localproxy. Enable only for local dev — not for external/Docker runs.

proxies.name: My VPS proxy
proxies.notes: Self-hosted edgeproxy on your VPS. Deploy with docker compose -f docker-compose.proxy.yml up -d. Replace USER, PASS, YOUR_VPS_IP. See config/SELF-HOST-PROXY.md.

proxies.name: HTTP residential (template)
proxies.notes: Paste credentials from Webshare, Bright Data, IPRoyal, Oxylabs, etc. Replace USER, PASS, YOUR-PROXY-HOST, and port.

proxies.name: HTTP datacenter (template)
proxies.notes: Datacenter HTTP gateway. Example host: pr.oxylabs.io — use the host and port from your provider dashboard.

proxies.name: SOCKS5 residential (template)
proxies.notes: SOCKS5 endpoint from IPRoyal, Bright Data, or similar. Replace USER, PASS, YOUR-PROXY-HOST, and port.
